1504000001.english: What's the current situation with Caracas's defensive forces?

1504000002.korean: 순찰을 다녀온 켈베로스 애들의 말에 의하면 카라카스 주변에 적의 AGS가 계속해서 움직이고 있다고 해.
1504000002.english: The Cerberus squad that just finished patrol says enemy AGS have been roaming around Caracas.

1504000003.korean: 몇 번인가 크고 작은 신경전 정도는 있었지만, 아직까지 큰 교전은 일어나진 않았어.
1504000003.english: We've had a few skirmishes, big and small, but nothing major has broken out yet.

1504000004.korean: 이쪽에는 우리 시티 가드 말고도 다른 부대도 지키고 있으니 쉽게 건들지는 못하겠지.
1504000004.english: Besides our City Guard, there are other units holding the line here, so they won't be easy to mess with.

1504000005.english: What about that Nidhogg AGS that was spotted recently?

1504000006.korean:
음, 전혀~
얼마 전에 모습을 드러낸 이후로 전혀 보이지 않고 있어.
1504000006.english: Hmm, not at all—since it showed up a while back, we haven't seen it again.

1504000007.korean: 그때는 우연히 지나가다 목격됐을 뿐, 사실 카라카스에는 아무런 볼일이 없던 게 아닐까 싶다니깐?
1504000007.english: It was just a chance sighting, so maybe it didn't have any business in Caracas at all.

1504000008.english: Well, that's probably not the case.

1504000009.korean: 카라카스의 지하통로에서 처음으로 녀석과 만났을 때 모습을 직접 본 건 아니지만, 내 시티 가드로서의 직감이 알려줬어.
1504000009.english: I didn't see it directly when we first ran into it in Caracas's underground tunnels, but my gut as a City Guard told me.

1504000010.korean: 내가 지금까지 봐온 그 어떤 범죄자보다 흉악한 녀석이란 걸 말이지.
1504000010.english: It's more vicious than any criminal I've ever encountered.

1504000011.korean:
독에 당했을 때는 정말이지 끝나는 줄 알았다고.
그놈 때문에 얼마나 고생했는지…
1504000011.english: When I got poisoned, I honestly thought that was the end. I've suffered so much because of that thing…

1504000012.english: And I'm still left with a bitter taste.

1504000013.english: Sorry I couldn't go with you back then.

1504000014.korean:
왜 그래, 버디? 어울리지 않게 갑자기 약한 모습을 보이고.
버디도 버디 나름대로 고생하다가 영광스러운 부상을 입은 거잖아?
1504000014.english: What's up, Buddy? Suddenly showing a weak side that doesn't suit you. You've been through your own hardships and earned those glorious scars, right?

1504000015.korean: 게다가 솔직히 말해서 그 자리에 버디가 있었다고 해서 뭔가 달라졌겠어?
1504000015.english: Honestly, would anything have changed just because you were there?

1504000016.korean: 그냥 내 옆자리 침대에 꼼짝없이 당한 버디가 똑같이 누워있었겠지.
1504000016.english: You’d just be lying there, helpless on the bed next to me, same as always.

1504000017.korean:
아무튼 계속해서 녀석의 행방을 쫓을 생각이야.
분명 이곳 카라카스 어딘가에서 흉악한 범죄를 저지를 게 뻔하니까.
1504000017.english: Anyway, I'm going to keep hunting it down. It's bound to commit some heinous crime somewhere in Caracas.

1504000018.korean: …의외인데? 농땡이를 전혀 피우지 않는 네 모습이라니.
1504000018.english: …That’s surprising. Seeing you never slack off at all.

1504000020.korean:
날 너무 농땡이만 피우는 아는 부패 경찰로 보는 거 아니야?
나도 할 때는 한다고?
1504000020.english: Don't think of me as just a lazy, corrupt cop. I do my job when I need to, you know?

1504000021.korean: 그런 말은 정기 훈련에 빠지지 않고 제대로 참석이나 좀 하면서 말해라.
1504000021.english: If you want to say that, actually show up to regular training and attend properly.

1504000022.korean: 경정이나 되는 놈이 매번 도망이나 가고. 그걸 쫓는 내 입장도 좀 생각해라.
1504000022.english: A rookie keeps running away every time. Think about my position, always having to chase them.

1504000023.korean: 오우, 경정이나 되는 몸이니까 훈련 정도는 좀 빠지면 어때.
1504000023.english: Oh, since you're just a rookie, why not skip training now and then?

1504000025.korean: 하하하, 뭐 어때. 지금 중요한 건 시티 가드로서 카라카스의 치안을 지키는 게 아니겠어?
1504000025.english: Haha, whatever. The important thing right now is keeping Caracas safe as a City Guard, right?

1504000026.korean: 만에 하나라도 니드호그 그놈이 카라카스에 독이라도 퍼트렸다간 끔찍한 일이 벌어질 거라고.
1504000026.english: If that Nidhogg ever spreads poison in Caracas, it'll end in a nightmare.

1504000027.korean: 오르카에도 지원을 요청을 해두었으니 조만간 지원 부대가 올 거다.
1504000027.english: We've already asked Orca for support, so reinforcements should arrive soon.

1504000028.korean: 놈의 목적이 뭔지는 모르겠지만, 절대로 원하는 대로 하게 두지 않을 거다.
1504000028.english: I don’t know what its goal is, but we won’t let it get away with whatever it wants.

1504000031.korean: 큰일이에요! 다수의 AGS가 카라카스로 접근하고 있어요!
1504000031.english: This is bad! A bunch of AGS units are heading toward Caracas!

1504000032.korean: 엄청난 기세인 게, 지금까지와는 다른 게 제대로 해볼 생각인 것 같아요!
1504000032.english: They're coming at us with insane force—it looks like they're finally trying something completely different!

1504000034.korean: 오우 좋아! 어디 한 번 해볼까 버디!
1504000034.english: Oh yeah! Want to give it a try, buddy?

1504000035.korean:
오랜만에 같이 합이나 맞춰보자고!
잘 따라올 수 있지?
1504000035.english: It's been ages—let's coordinate together! You can keep up, right?

1504000036.english: Hah! Who are you talking to right now?

1504000037.english: You, you better stay on my tail!
